rounds: The 6am necklace with zero deliberation? That's yours. Toes painted on a Saturday, shade-comparing in the chemist without flinching? Both yours. But the joy police were loud this week — they got some airtime, even if they didn't get the final word. The bracelet is still on a wish list, not on your wrist. Not yet.
pattern: They're loudest right before you do the thing — then you do it anyway.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt.
